engine.role: Authoritative for extraction, rules math, Prisma sessions, safety guards, server actions.

uiPrototype.role: Authoritative for renter-facing UX, copilot panel, 3D Guide, stage rail, export UX. Must NOT invent thresholds, geography, or field allowlists.

shared.role: Single source of truth for frozen demo constants. Both stacks read this file. Cursor agents edit here first; Lovable imports or mirrors values.

persistentNotices: You confirm. A qualified human decides.

syncRules: Edit shared/realdoor-contract.json before changing geography, MTSP limits, dates, or allowlists.
Lovable UI (src/) must import frozen values from this contract — never hardcode Sacramento or synthetic placeholder limits.
Next engine (lib/, data/) must align data/config.json and loaders with this contract.
Do not merge Lovable and Next into one runtime. They are sibling apps in one repo.
Lovable auto-pushes to realdoor-copilot; canonical merge target is HackNationProto branch lovable/realdoor-ui.
After contract changes: run Next tests; send Lovable a message pointing at the updated contract on GitHub.
